narrative:
Grandview Twp township has 987 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
